title: YTP Tennis: The Insanity of Haruhi Suzumiya
description:
In this video, Haruhi opens a can of whoopass on Canada. Canada, being Canada, opens a can of diet whoopass.

This is round 2 of a tennis match between me and @BatHunterofDevon , and you can check out their round 1 right here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s86sLScyuEQ
